title: DWR Training Materials
text:
NoteFrequently Asked Questions



Where can I find more information about DataLab workshops?
Take a look at our Workshop Descriptions and Materials page.
How can I contact DataLab?
Email datalab@ucdavis.edu.
For questions about a workshop you attended, you can also email the instructors directly:

Nick Ulle (naulle@ucdavis.edu)
Pamela Reynolds (plreynolds@ucdavis.edu)
Wesley Brooks (wbrooks@ucdavis.edu)

title: DWR Training Materials
text:
Intermediate R

All sessions are 10-noon in Shields 360 and on Zoom
Standalone sessions (attend any or all):

Apr 2 – Next-level Data Visualization (with ggplot2)
Apr 9, Apr 16 – Cleaning & Reshaping Data
Apr 23 – Best Practices for Writing R Scripts
Apr 30 – Squashing Bugs with R’s Debugging Tools
